expectations.text: New JSON params defined including crawl space height, vent width, vent height, and vent spacing fields
expectations.evidence: crawlSpaceHeightIn, ventWidthIn, ventHeightIn, ventSpacingIn, ventBottomOffsetIn, footingWidthIn, footingThicknessIn all defined

expectations.text: draw_box called for each wall segment between vent cutouts (not one monolithic box)
expectations.evidence: Pseudocode iterates solid_h_intervals and calls draw_box for each sub-segment; above/below vent also drawn separately

expectations.text: subtract_intervals used to compute wall segments with vent openings removed
Vent vertical position: 4 inches above bottom of stem wall (z_off + 4), not at top or bottom
expectations.evidence: ventBottomOffsetIn: 4" specified in JSON params and used in above/below-vent geometry split

expectations.text: apply_bim_data called with 'Footing' type and Concrete material for BIM attribution
expectations.evidence: apply_bim_data(group, 'Footing') shown in pseudocode; IFC IfcFooting + Concrete material table included

expectations.text: Foundation height calculation updated: crawl space height contributes to the Z offset used by walls above
expectations.evidence: Explicit section: 'if foundation_type == crawl-space then foundation_height = crawl_space_height_in'
